top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Climb on Tech, Yen Hits 40-Year Low: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian equities rose, leaving the regional benchmark on track for its best quarterly gain in 17 years as technology stocks rallied. The yen weakened to a four-decade low against the dollar.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The AI boom is colliding with a new threat: Severe weather
top_signals.summary: Heatwaves and severe weather are raising risks for AI data centers, from grid strain to higher insurance and repair costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin lending is entering a new institutional era, according to Silicon Valley Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
